Regression harness deck

Stable editing baseline

This fixture exercises text editing, selection, duplication, export validation, and theme switching without relying on framework code.

Compact callout container used for selection and layout checks.
Absolute positioned card for coordinate-space checks.
Fixed positioned badge for viewport-relative checks.
Nested absolute card for positioned-context checks.
Transform root should route unsafe direct manipulation to a safe fallback path.

Media slide

Video and inserted blocks land here during regression scenarios.
